name: Gizmek Taniguku, the Immobile Intellect
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>巧</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>蛙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>わ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>磐盾多邇具久</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>イワタテノタニグク</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can take 1 Machine monster whose ATK equals its own DEF from your Deck and place it on top of your Deck. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Machine monster in your GY whose ATK equals its own DEF; Special Summon it in Defense Position. You can only use each effect of "Gizmek Taniguku, the Immobile Intellect" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can take 1 Machine monster whose ATK equals its own DEF from your Deck and place it on top of your Deck. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Machine monster in your GY whose ATK equals its own DEF; Special Summon it in Defense Position. You can only use each effect of "Gizmek Taniguku, the Immobile Intellect" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can take 1 Machine monster whose ATK equals its own DEF from your Deck and place it on top of your Deck. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Machine monster in your GY whose ATK equals its own DEF; Special Summon it in Defense Position. You can only use each effect of "Gizmek Taniguku, the Immobile Intellect" once per turn.

action: Places cards from the player's Deck on the top of the Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
